framework.name: Open Brain Architecture
framework.description: A database-backed, AI-accessible knowledge system using MCP (Model Context Protocol) that allows any AI tool to access your context without vendor lock-in, costing $0.10-0.30 monthly.
implications: Use MCP for AI tool interoperability
Expect extremely low costs for personal knowledge systems
framework.raw_quote: A databasebacked AI accessible knowledge system that you own outright with no SAS middlemen that can break or repric or disappear. One brain that every AI you use, Claude, Chat, GPT, Cursor, whatever ships next month, can plug into via MCP

source.title: You Don't Need SaaS. The $0.10 System That Replaced My AI Workflow (45 Min No-Code Build)
source.author: AI News & Strategy Daily | Nate B Jones
